stories.headline: Alan Greenspan, Fed Chairman Through Prosperity and Crisis, Dies at 100
stories.summary: The pre-eminent economic policymaker of his time and a skilled political operator, he favored market-friendly stances that would later come to be associated with destructive financial forces.

stories.headline: Los Angeles Warehouse Fire Smoke Chokes Southern California for Fifth Day
stories.summary: A fire at a cold storage warehouse near downtown Los Angeles continued pumping fumes across Southern California five days after it ignited, prompting emergency declarations as air quality reached unhealthy levels.

stories.headline: Why has Keir Starmer resigned as UK prime minister?
stories.summary: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer has announced his resignation after just two years in office.

stories.headline: Iran and US make progress on Hormuz despite Trump's explosive threats
stories.summary: JD Vance said 18 hours of talks in Switzerland had "laid a very good foundation" after both sides agreed a mechanism to keep the Strait of Hormuz open and maintain Lebanon's ceasefire, even as Trump threatened to hit Iran "only harder".

stories.summary: Londoners shared mixed reactions to Keir Starmer's resignation.

stories.headline: 'Another day, another leader': Londoners react to Starmer's resignation
stories.summary: People in central London expressed frustration, uncertainty and cautious hope after Keir Starmer announced his resignation as UK prime minister.

stories.headline: EU 're-assessing' summit with UK after Keir Starmer lays out exit plan
stories.summary: A European Commission spokesperson said on Monday that the EU is "reassessing" plans to hold a summit with the UK in late July, as it becomes increasingly likely that Prime Minister Keir Starmer's successor will be in post in just three and a half weeks.

stories.headline: Kenya minister found in contempt of court over US-backed Ebola centre

stories.headline: Japan’s Retail FX Traders Bet Their Government Can Prop Up Yen
stories.summary: Japan’s army of retail currency traders have heeded their government’s warning and stopped betting on the yen to decline, putting them at odds with professional investors positioning for further weakness.

stories.headline: Mexico Raises $6.3 Billion in New Bonds to Fund Buyback
stories.summary: Mexico raised $6.3 billion in bonds to fund a buyback of its existing debt as credit-rating firms warn over the nation’s widening fiscal deficit, raising concerns over its investment-grade status.

stories.headline: Mr. Fed Pres.: Warsh Every Bit as Nuanced as Greenspan
stories.summary: Thomas Hoenig, Former Kansas City Fed President discusses the leadership style of former Fed Chair Alan Greenspan during FOMC meetings, providing historical context and perspective on Greenspan's approach to monetary policy decision-making. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.headline: Embattled Superintendent of Los Angeles School District Resigns
stories.summary: Alberto Carvalho resigned Sunday, months after the F.B.I. raided his home and office. He came to Los Angeles from Miami with a reputation for raising student test scores but also made missteps.

stories.headline: Kenyan court finds minister in contempt over US Ebola site

stories.summary: Asian stocks were set for a positive open as oil largely held Monday’s losses, with investors continuing to watch developments in US-Iran peace talks.

stories.headline: Iran Oil Waiver Offers Lifeline to Tehran as Talks Proceed
stories.summary: The US issued a 60-day license allowing Iran to sell oil on the international market, giving Tehran an economic lifeline as the two adversaries continued talks for a permanent peace deal.

stories.headline: USA Rare Earth Rebuts MP Materials Suit as Rivalry Deepens
stories.summary: USA Rare Earth Inc. pushed back against allegations by MP Materials Corp., calling a lawsuit filed by its rival an attempt to hinder the company’s growth.

stories.headline: Gas Stations Accused of Using AI to Boost California Prices
stories.summary: A group of California consumers claimed in a lawsuit that gas station owners including Walmart Inc., Marathon Petroleum Corp., BP Plc and 7-Eleven Inc. are using artificial intelligence to illegally manipulate pump prices in the state that already has the highest rates in the US.

stories.headline: Avis Set for $650 Million Pentwater Payout After Short Squeeze
stories.summary: Avis Budget Group Inc. is set to receive $650 million in cash as part of a settlement agreement with Pentwater Capital Management to resolve a lawsuit regarding short-swing profits, according to a filing.

stories.headline: CME Direct Trading Platform Is Back Up After Earlier Disruptions
stories.summary: Trading on CME Group Inc.’s CME Direct platform is back up after a brief disruption Monday as it experienced technical difficulties, according to traders.

stories.headline: Espriella’s Narrow Win Caps Post Election Gains in Colombia
stories.summary: The rally sparked by Abelardo de la Espriella’s win in Colombian elections faded just hours into the session as investors worried that one of the tightest presidential elections in the nation’s history will limit his mandate to implement market-friendly policies.

stories.headline: Federal Citizenship Data Tool Cannot Be Used to Screen Voters, Judge Rules
stories.summary: A federal judge ruled that the Trump administration’s providing federal data to states to check and purge their voter rolls violated several laws prohibiting the disclosure.

stories.headline: The Dispute Over Events for America’s 250th Birthday, Explained
stories.summary: Two national groups, including one backed by President Trump, have planned an array of activities to celebrate the country’s semiquincentennial. States are also hosting many events.

stories.headline: Bowen: Iran deal ends Trump's war that revealed limit of US dominance
